[
  {
    "idea": "Weekly surge in Google Trends for 'DIY car maintenance' signals rising auto sector interest",
    "family": "consumer_stress",
    "data": {
      "source": "Google Trends weekly search interest",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "weekly",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "An increase in searches for DIY car maintenance often precedes higher demand for auto parts and services, reflecting consumer stress on vehicle upkeep costs.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bullish",
      "sector": "XLI",
      "rationale": "Auto parts and industrial sectors benefit from increased vehicle maintenance activity."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "Enter long XLI when 3-week moving average of 'DIY car maintenance' Google Trends rises more than 15% week-over-week",
      "exit": "Exit after 4 weeks or if the 2-week moving average declines below 5% week-over-week",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 12,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Weekly Google Trends data often shows repeated interest spikes in consumer maintenance topics."
  },

    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "high",
